infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Burger Day to access your photo library to upload burger photos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Burger Day to use your camera to take burger photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Burger Day to access your location to find nearby McDonald's.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Burger Day to access your location to find nearby McDonald's.
